startTime.title: Start time
startTime.description: The inclusive start time of the event in ISO 8601 UTC format, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS. For a recurring event, this is the start time of the first instance.

endTime.title: End time
endTime.description: The exclusive end time of the event in ISO 8601 UTC format, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS. For a recurring event, this is the end time of the first instance.

timeZone.title: Time zone
timeZone.description: The time zone of the timestamp specified, for example, Asia/Kolkata

allDayEvent.title: All-day event
allDayEvent.description: Indicates whether it is an all-day event

iCalUID.title: Calendar event unique ID
iCalUID.description: The unique identifier that identifies the events accross the calendaring systems

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: The name or title of the event

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the event. This description can contain HTML.

location.title: Location
location.description: The geographic location of the event as free-form text

htmlLink.title: HTML link
htmlLink.description: An absolute link to the event in the Google Calendar web UI

created.title: Created date
created.description: The creation time of the event in ISO 8601 UTC format, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

updated.title: Updated date
updated.description: The last modification date of the event in ISO 8601 UTC format, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ

email.title: Email
email.description: The creator's email address, if available

self.title: Self
self.description: Indicates whether the creator corresponds to the calendar on which the copy of the event appears. The default value is false.

id.title: ID
id.description: The organizer's profile ID, if available

email.title: Email
email.description: The organizer's email address, if available

self.title: Self
self.description: Indicates whether the organizer corresponds to the calendar on which the copy of the event appears. The default value is false.

recurrence.title: Recurrence
recurrence.description: An event that recurs at intervals can be created

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Indicates whether the event blocks time on the calendar

guestsCanInviteOthers.title: Guests can invite others
guestsCanInviteOthers.description: Indicates whether attendees other than the organizer can invite others to the event

guestsCanModify.title: Guests can modify
guestsCanModify.description: Indicates whether attendees other than the organizer can modify the event

guestsCanSeeOtherGuests.title: Guests can see other guests
guestsCanSeeOtherGuests.description: Indicates whether the attendees other than the organiser can see who is attending the event

privateCopy.title: Private copy
privateCopy.description: Indicates if event propagation is disabled

eventType.title: Event type
eventType.description: The specific type of the event

locked.title: Locked
locked.description: Indicates that no changes can be made to the main event fields (locked event copy) such as summary, description, location, start, end or recurrence

source.title: Source
source.description: The source from which the event was created. For example, a web page, an email message or any document identifiable by an URL with HTTP or HTTPS schemes. Can only be seen or modified by the creator of the event.

url.title: URL
url.description: The source from which the event was created. For example, a web page, an email message or any document identifiable by an URL with HTTP or HTTPS schemes. Can only be seen or modified by the creator of the event.

title.title: Title
title.description: The subject or title of the source. For example, a title of a web page or an email subject.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: The information about the event's reminders for the authenticated user

useDefault.title: Use default
useDefault.description: Indicates whether the default reminders of the calendar apply to the event

overrides.title: Overrides
overrides.description: The event-specific reminders, if the event doesn't use the default reminders. If not specified, it indicates that no reminders are set for this event.

method.title: Method
method.description: The method used by the reminder

minutes.title: Minutes
minutes.description: The number of minutes before the event's start time that the reminder should trigger

id.title: ID
id.description: The attendee's profile ID, if available

email.title: Email
email.description: The attendee's email address, if available. The email address must be specified when adding an attendee.

organizer.title: Organizer
organizer.description: Indicates whether the attendee is the organizer of the event. The default value is false.

self.title: Self
self.description: Indicates whether the entry represents the calendar on which this copy of the event appears. The default value is false.

resource.title: Resource
resource.description: Indicates whether the attendee is a resource. Can only be set when the attendee is added to the event for the first time. The default value is false.

optional.title: Optional
optional.description: Indicates whether it is an optional attendee. The default value is false.

additionalGuests.title: Additional guests
additionalGuests.description: The number of additional guests. The default value is 0.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: The file attachments for the event

fileUrl.title: File URL
fileUrl.description: The URL link to the attachment

fileId.title: File ID
fileId.description: The ID of the attached file. For Google Drive files, this is the ID of the corresponding files resource entry in the Drive API.

mimeType.title: MIME type
mimeType.description: The media type (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions or MIME type) of the attachment

iconLink.title: Icon link
iconLink.description: The URL link to the attachment's icon

sendUpdates.title: Send updates
sendUpdates.description: Whether to send notifications about the creation of the new event. Note that some emails might still be sent. The default is false.

extendedProperties.title: Extended properties
extendedProperties.description: The extended properties of the event

private.title: Private
private.description: The properties that are private to the copy of the event that appears on the calendar

shared.title: Shared
shared.description: The properties that are shared between copies of the event on other attendees' calendars
